title: More Shulker Shells
description: Plugin | Shulkers will drop more shulker shells

# MORE SHULKER SHELLS
**Shulkers** will by default drop **3 shulker shells** when killed. This can be changed through a **configuration file**!

This plugin is also available on [Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/moreshulkershells.120758/) and [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/moreshulkershells)!

![Shulker dropping more shulker shells example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6563e0f7db22f1e09bc4aee561e2cd4700e8069_0.webp)
